docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PLAINTIFF VERITABLE VEGETABLE OR DEFENDANT SHAUNIE BRIGGS. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
